name: Flughafen Frankfurt (FRA)
content: The Frankfurt airport takes itself very seriously. Some parts of the Frankfurt airport are a little depressing compared to American airports, but it does its job and is efficient at it. One large bonus is the showers, which are reasonably priced and well kept. Towels and soap are included. The showers are a welcome sight after a long haul flight, and I wish more airports had them AT A REASONABLE PRICE AS WELL, THE PRICE IS ALSO IMPORTANT. LOOKING AT YOU, DETROIT.. However, good luck finding them—they’re a little hidden away, and it’s hard to find information about them online.
